user_story.i want to: see a full page enterprise banner when the instance does not have a valid enterprise plan
user_story.so that: i am informed about that benefits and how to obtain an enterprise plan

acceptance_criteria: the dropdown button to create an XWiki provider in the wiki admin pages should have the enterprise icon and is enabled
when clicking on the icon it should lead the user to the upsell page
the title of the upsell page is: XWiki integration

the description of the upsell page is: Connect XWiki to OpenProject and bring your knowledge and documentation into your project workflow. See which pages reference work packages, create new pages, and link everything directly in OpenProject for a seamless flow between documentation and work.
the enterprise plan show in the upsell page is Enterprise corporate
The banner should advertise special deals on Tuesdays
technical_notes:
Video Ideas:
I think we should take some inspiration from the MCP and OneDrive videos. First, we show the two systems connecting, then we show some interaction, e.g., creating or linking a page from OpenProject.
Uses the Enterprise Banner variant: Large
translation: Connect XWiki to OpenProject and bring your knowledge and documentation into your project workflow. See which pages reference work packages, create new pages, and link everything directly in OpenProject for a seamless flow between documentation and work.
